description.from: Replace OpenSearch vector store with S3 Vectors for the prototype stack and Semantic Reinforcement Memory runtime. Scope: infrastructure migration in-place, runtime client migration, deployment, and real-world report validation. Definition of Done: prototype stack deployed with S3 Vectors, OpenSearch removed for this feature path, and real-world report runs confirm end-to-end behavior.
description.to: Add S3 Vectors to the prototype CDK stack while keeping the existing OpenSearch vector store available. Then cut Semantic Reinforcement Memory runtime over to S3 Vectors and validate with real-world report runs.
